worktree_state.content:
# ============================================
# E-Menum Docker Compose Configuration
# ============================================
# Development environment with all services
# Usage:
#   docker-compose up -d          # Start all services
#   docker-compose up -d db redis # Start only DB and Redis
#   docker-compose down           # Stop all services
#   docker-compose logs -f app    # Follow app logs
# ============================================

version: '3.8'

services:
  # --------------------------------------------
  # Application Service
  # --------------------------------------------
  app:
    build:
      context: .
      dockerfile: Dockerfile
    container_name: emenum-app
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - '3000:3000'
    environment:
      NODE_ENV: production
      PORT: 3000
      APP_NAME: E-Menum
      APP_DOMAIN: e-menum.net
      APP_URL: http://localhost:3000
      DATABASE_URL: postgresql://postgres:password@db:5432/emenum
      REDIS_URL: redis://redis:6379
      REDIS_PREFIX: 'emenum:'
      JWT_SECRET: ${JWT_SECRET:-change-me-in-production-256-bit-secret}
      JWT_REFRESH_SECRET: ${JWT_REFRESH_SECRET:-change-me-refresh-secret}
      JWT_ACCESS_EXPIRY: 15m
      JWT_REFRESH_EXPIRY: 7d
      BCRYPT_ROUNDS: 12
      LOG_LEVEL: info
      LOG_FORMAT: json
    depends_on:
      db:
        condition: service_healthy
      redis:
        condition: service_healthy
    volumes:
      - uploads:/app/uploads
    networks:
      - emenum-network
    healthcheck:
      test: ['CMD', 'wget', '--no-verbose', '--tries=1', '--spider', 'http://localhost:3000/health']
      interval: 30s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 3
      start_period: 10s

  # --------------------------------------------
  # PostgreSQL Database
  # --------------------------------------------
  db:
    image: postgres:15-alpine
    container_name: emenum-db
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - '5432:5432'
    environment:
      POSTGRES_USER: postgres
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: password
      POSTGRES_DB: emenum
      PGDATA: /var/lib/postgresql/data/pgdata
    volumes:
      - postgres_data:/var/lib/postgresql/data/pgdata
    networks:
      - emenum-network
    healthcheck:
      test: ['CMD-SHELL', 'pg_isready -U postgres -d emenum']
      interval: 10s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 5
      start_period: 10s

  # --------------------------------------------
  # Redis Cache & Queue
  # --------------------------------------------
  redis:
    image: redis:7-alpine
    container_name: emenum-redis
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - '6379:6379'
    command: redis-server --appendonly yes --maxmemory 256mb --maxmemory-policy allkeys-lru
    volumes:
      - redis_data:/data
    networks:
      - emenum-network
    healthcheck:
      test: ['CMD', 'redis-cli', 'ping']
      interval: 10s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 5
      start_period: 5s

# --------------------------------------------
# Development Override (docker-compose.dev.yml)
# --------------------------------------------
# For development, create docker-compose.override.yml:
#
# version: '3.8'
# services:
#   app:
#     build:
#       target: deps
#     command: npm run dev
#     volumes:
#       - .:/app
#       - /app/node_modules
#     environment:
#       NODE_ENV: development
#       LOG_LEVEL: debug
#       LOG_FORMAT: pretty
# --------------------------------------------

# --------------------------------------------
# Volumes
# --------------------------------------------
volumes:
  postgres_data:
    driver: local
  redis_data:
    driver: local
  uploads:
    driver: local

# --------------------------------------------
# Networks
# --------------------------------------------
networks:
  emenum-network:
    driver: bridge
